title: Stop perfecting your prompt. Do this instead
summary: Jeff Su argues that practitioners should stop perfecting prompts and instead focus on providing better context and grounding. He distinguishes three key concepts: grounding (giving AI actual documents to reference), RAG (retrieving sources before generating answers), and context engineering (assembling all necessary background and constraints rather than just optimizing wording).
